violations.text: Cardboard is used in the lining of bar cooler(s) in the food prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

The floors and counters throughout the food prep area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025

Chemical bottles were observed hanging on the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024
Inspector observed exposed wood observed behind the bar. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024
Dishwashing machine located in the bar was observed in poor repair PIC took unit out of service and was instructed to use 3 bay sink to wash, rinse and sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024
Missing ceiling tiles were observed in back storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
Light shield in walk-in cooler was observed cracked. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024
